news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We'll see what the way forward is for any bitcoin acquisition.
Dillon Consulting Limited partners with FBM from Halifax, Nova Scotia, in new collaboration.
news.summary: In Toronto, Dillon Consulting Limited has recently partnered with FBM of Halifax, Nova Scotia. This collaboration marks an important milestone for the company, strengthening its presence in the industry.

news.headline: Blackstone closes $8B real estate debt fund, BREDS V, with significant investor capital amid market dislocation.
news.summary: In New York, Blackstone disclosed the completion of fundraising for its latest real estate debt fund, Blackstone Real Estate Debt Strategies V, known as BREDS V, with around $8 billion in total capital commitments. Tim Johnson, Global Head of Blackstone Real Estate Debt Strategies, expressed gratitude towards investors for their support amid market challenges. The company is highly optimistic about the opportunities arising from this substantial capital allocation.

news.headline: Primaris REIT renews normal course issuer bid; can buy up to 7,567,092 Series A units, 10% of public float.
news.summary: Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: PMZ.UN) has successfully obtained approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange to proceed with the renewal of its normal course issuer bid (NCIB). Through this bid, Primaris intends to repurchase and cancel a maximum of 7,567,092 of its Series A units ("Units") on the open market. This number corresponds to 10% of the "public float," as per the stipulated guidelines. The Trust aims to execute this strategic move to enhance its value proposition and optimize its capital structure.

news.headline: Coinbase CEO praises Trump's move to establish Bitcoin reserve with 200,000 seized coins, aiming to make US a key player.
news.summary: Experts in the industry have praised President Donald Trump's recent executive order which has established a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. This move is seen as significant and potentially game-changing, as it could accelerate the worldwide acceptance of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and validate it as a legitimate financial asset.The order involves using 200,000 Bitcoin already possessed by the federal government from various criminal and civil cases. The primary aim is to position the United States as a major player in the cryptocurrency market, all without imposing any additional costs on taxpayers.David Sacks, the White House's artificial intelligence and crypto expert, who played a crucial role in Trump's administration, provided insights into the executive order's specifics. He mentioned that the reserve will be funded with confiscated Bitcoin, ensuring that taxpayers are not financially impacted.Sacks emphasized that the U.S. has no intentions to sell any Bitcoin deposited into the reserve; instead, it will be maintained as a secure source of value. This groundbreaking strategy could have far-reaching implications in the cryptocurrency realm.

news.headline: APi Group to join 2025 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on March 12th at 10:30 a.m.; tune in via company's website.
news.summary: In New Brighton, Minnesota, APi Group Corporation (NYSE: APG) revealed that its senior leadership will partake in a fireside chat at the 2025 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on March 12, starting at 10:30 a.m. ET. The event will be accessible via a live webcast link and archived replay on APi's Investor Relations webpage at www.apigroupcorp.com. Interested individuals are encouraged to visit the company's website for potential schedule alterations or additional information.

news.headline: Aegis Brands reports fourth quarter and year-end results, with EBITDA up 62% to $6.0 million in 2024, St. Louis contributing $11.4 million in EBITDA, system sales up 8.1%, and 4 new locations opened.CEO is optimistic about the future and launching a new menu in spring.
news.summary: Aegis Brands Inc. has reported financial results for the fourth quarter and year ending December 29th, 2024. In the fourth quarter, system sales increased to $31 million, while same store sales decreased by 4.5%. EBITDA for the quarter rose to $1.2 million from $0.1 million in 2023, resulting in a net income of $0.3 million. For the fiscal year, system sales reached $133.1 million, with same-store sales up 4.5%, and operating income doubling to $4.8 million. Net income was $1.5 million for the year, improved from a loss of $0.7 million in 2023. EBITDA for the year reached $6.0 million, a 62% increase from the previous year, largely attributed to the success of St. Louis Bar & Grill. St. Louis contributed $11.4 million in EBITDA for 2024, with same store sales up 4.5%. Aegis also noted the opening of new locations and strategic changes, including partnerships with brands like Sweet Jesus and Top Golf "Swing Suite." CEO Steven Pelton announced plans for an updated menu in spring 2025 to attract new customers and maintain growth momentum.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: Proposed Ukraine minerals, energy deal not rapacious.
Investors flock to global infrastructure with $1.5 trillion targeting essential services.
TG Therapeutics will present BRIUMVI® data at AAN 2025 Annual Meeting for multiple sclerosis patients, to be held in San Diego on April 5-9. Visit AAN website for abstracts.
news.summary: TG Therapeutics, Inc. revealed the schedule for showcasing BRIUMVI® (ublituximab-xiiy) data for patients with relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis (RMS) at the American Academy of Neurology 2025 annual meeting in San Diego, California on April 5-9, 2025. The abstracts can be viewed on the AAN meeting website at https://www.aan.com/events/annual-meeting-abstracts. This announcement was made on March 07, 2025.

news.headline: Plus Therapeutics reports promising Phase 1 results for Rhenium (186Re) Obisbemeda in Glioblastoma, published in Nature Communications.
news.summary: Plus Therapeutics has revealed that a recent publication in Nature Communications showcased encouraging Phase 1 trial outcomes for their drug Rhenium (186Re) Obisbemeda. The study, which underwent peer review, reported positive results indicating the drug's potential efficacy. The data showed promising results in terms of safety and effectiveness. This announcement marks a significant milestone for the company in advancing the development of this novel treatment. According to the publication, the drug exhibited favorable results, achieving a xx% response rate in patients with various types of cancers. These findings support the continued development of Rhenium (186Re) Obisbemeda as a potential therapeutic option.

news.headline: Lands' End explores strategic alternatives, including sale, merger to maximize shareholder value. Board of Directors initiate process.
news.summary: DODGEVILLE, Wisconsin, Mar 07, 2025 - Lands' End, Inc. (NASDAQ: LE) revealed that the Board of Directors has started examining strategic options aimed at enhancing shareholder value. This may involve a potential sale, merger, or comparable transaction concerning the Company.

news.headline: SFMTA buys 42 hybrid buses from NFI's New Flyer, supporting US manufacturing jobs. Order from Q4 2024 backlog.
news.summary: NFI Group Inc., a top bus and coach manufacturer, through its subsidiary New Flyer of America Inc., revealed a significant deal with the San Francisco Municipal Transportation Agency on March 7, 2025. The order consists of 42 Xcelsior® 40-foot hybrid buses, fulfilling Buy America standards to boost U.S. manufacturing jobs. This order is included in NFI’s Q4 2024 backlog, demonstrating the company's continued growth. The NFI Group is listed as (TSX: NFI, OTC: NFYEF, TSX: NFI.DB) on the stock market.

news.headline: NextGen Digital reaffirms commitment to democratizing access to digital assets amidst U.S. President Trump's executive order to establish a strategic bitcoin reserve.
news.summary: In Fredericton, New Brunswick, on March 07, 2025, NextGen Digital Platforms Inc. (CSE:NXT) (OTCQB:NXTDF) (FSE:Z12) has restated its dedication to broadening access to digital assets. This comes in response to U.S. President Donald Trump's recent executive order to form a strategic bitcoin reserve. The reserve is set to be funded with bitcoin held by the federal government.

news.headline: Kura Oncology grants 190,000 stock options to 6 new employees on March 3, 2025, under the 2023 Inducement Option Plan.
news.summary: On March 3, 2025, Kura Oncology, Inc. granted inducement awards to six new employees in the form of nonstatutory stock options. The stock options allow the purchase of 190,000 shares of common stock and were issued under the Company's 2023 Inducement Option Plan. This grant was approved by the Compensation Committee of the Company's Board of Directors in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Kura Oncology, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol KURA, focusing on precision medicines for cancer treatment.

news.headline: Global Digital Thermometers Market valued at $782.1 million in 2023, projected to reach $1.5 billion by 2034, growing at 6.1% CAGR. Rise driven by demand for accurate temperature monitoring and technological advancements. Market witnessing strong growth due to health awareness and innovative thermometer technologies, offering opportunities for medical device manufacturers and healthcare providers. Telehealth expansion and home healthcare solutions further driving market adoption. Key players include Braun GmbH, Omron Healthcare, Exergen Corporation, Beurer GmbH, Microlife Corporation, and Thermo Fisher Scientific.
news.summary: The Global Digital Thermometers Market was valued at US$ 782.1 million in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 6.1% from 2024 to 2034, reaching US$ 1.5 billion by 2034. This growth is driven by increasing demand for accurate and fast temperature monitoring, advancements in infrared and smart thermometers, and rising healthcare awareness. The market is experiencing strong growth due to increasing health consciousness, sensor technology breakthrough, and demand for precise temperature measurement. Digital thermometers are replacing mercury-based devices due to safety, ease of use, and accuracy. The market will witness rapid growth with high demand for non-contact infrared thermometers, smart thermometers with mobile apps, and wearable gadgets for temperature tracking. The expansion of telehealth services and home healthcare solutions is further fueling market adoption. Key players in the market include Braun GmbH, Omron Healthcare, Exergen Corporation, Beurer GmbH, Microlife Corporation, and Thermo Fisher Scientific. Manufacturers are employing strategies like new product launches, distribution agreements, acquisitions, and partnerships to strengthen their competitive position in the market.

news.headline: FDA clears Zimmer Biomet's Persona® Revision Solution™ Femur for patients with metal sensitivities. TextFormFieldspecifics and numbers.
news.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc., a leading global medical technology company, has introduced a new option for patients with metal sensitivities who require a revision knee implant. The company's Persona® implant has received clearance from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) through the 510(k) process. This development was announced in Warsaw, Ind., on March 7, 2025. Zimmer Biomet is listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) and the SIX Swiss Exchange under the ticker symbol ZBH.

news.headline: WhiteHorse Finance reports $0.385 per share distribution for Q4 & full year 2024, NY - March 7, 2025.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, WhiteHorse Finance, Inc. (Nasdaq: WHF) shared its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and the full year concluding on December 31, 2024. The board of directors of the Company also approved a distribution as part of this announcement.

news.headline: Aucera wins 5 Stevie Awards for customer experience, innovation, and leadership, reinforcing their industry commitment.
news.summary: Aucera, based in Mahwah, New Jersey, has recently received notable recognition for its focus on human-centered service, innovative technology, and leadership in the industry. This esteemed acknowledgment includes winning five Stevie® Awards at the 19th annual Stevie Awards for Sales & Customer Service. The company's dedication to excellence is further validated by this commendation.

news.headline: DeFi Technologies acquires 52.5% stake in Swiss AI firm Neuronomics AG, expands into asset management.
news.summary: DeFi Technologies has boosted its ownership in Neuronomics AG to 52.5%, after obtaining a majority stake in the Swiss asset management firm. Neuronomics AG focuses on artificial intelligence and computational neurosciences. This move signifies a strategic advancement in asset management and trading for DeFi Technologies.

news.headline: Article features quotes from Nancy Kerrigan, Indra Nooyi, etc., on smart decisions and pursuing work interests.
news.summary: Explore motivating words on the importance of making wise choices, persevering through challenges, and pursuing meaningful work. The article features quotes from individuals such as Nancy Kerrigan and Indra Nooyi.

news.headline: People may not be stronger but know how to bounce back; being resilient is key to tackling adversity.
news.summary: In times of hardship, many believe they are strong enough to withstand challenges, only to falter when faced with adversity. The ability to bounce back is a crucial trait of resilient individuals, who understand how to navigate difficult circumstances. This was highlighted in a recent article on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Longsys to feature high-reliability storage innovations at Embedded World 2025 in Nuremberg, Germany from March 11-13.
news.summary: Scheduled to take place from March 11 to 13, 2025, in Nuremberg, Germany, Embedded World is a leading global event for embedded technology. Known for showcasing cutting-edge innovation, the exhibition is a key gathering for professionals in the industry.

PBOC vows to improve production of financial statistics.
Investor Howard Marks predicts reduced S&P 500 returns in the next decade.
SKF's Annual and Sustainability Report for 2024 is now online, highlighting strategic decarbonization efforts.
news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on March 7, 2025, AB SKF released its Annual and Sustainability Report for 2024 on the company's website. This report showcases SKF's efforts in creating value for customers, shareholders, and stakeholders. It details the strategic initiatives undertaken by the Group throughout the year.

news.headline: China Commerce Ministry: We urge the US to correct wrong practices, view and handle its own fentanyl problem objectively and rationally, and not blindly shift the blame.
Ellington Credit announces $0.08 div/share, payable on April 25, 2025 to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Old Greenwich, Connecticut, Ellington Credit Company (NYSE: EARN) disclosed that its Board of Trustees sanctioned a monthly common dividend of $0.08 per share. The dividend is set to be distributed on April 25, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of March 31, 2025. The company issued a cautionary statement concerning forward-looking statements as per the safe harbor provisions of the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995. This announcement outlines their financial decision-making and projections for the future, highlighting their commitment to shareholder value.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: I think we will see a pick up in corporate activity.
Manu Skyttä, CEO of Aspocomp Group Plc, acquired shares on March 5-6, 2025. Total 2922 shares bought at avg price 5.76 EUR.
news.summary: Manu Skyttä, the Chief Executive Officer of Aspocomp Group Oyj, made several acquisitions of shares on March 5 and March 6, 2025. On March 5, he acquired a total of 2,922 shares at various prices ranging from 5.58 EUR to 5.84 EUR, with a volume-weighted average price of 5.76136 EUR. On March 6, he further acquired 678 shares at prices ranging from 5.2 EUR to 5.76 EUR, with a volume-weighted average price of 5.60378 EUR. Aspocomp Group Plc provides PCB technology design, testing, and logistics services for electronic devices. Their customers are global, mainly in telecommunications, automotive, industrial electronics, and security technology sectors. For more information, contact Manu Skyttä, President and CEO of Aspocomp Group.

news.headline: Love To Dream urges US parents to embrace 'Arms Up' movement for better sleep, chance to win $25,000 during Sleep Awareness Month.
news.summary: The renowned baby and toddler sleep brand, Love to Dream™, is introducing their 'Arms Up' campaign during Sleep Awareness Month. The initiative aims to promote better sleep for families globally. The brand, recognized for enhancing sleep quality for millions, is urging parents to prioritize restful sleep. Love to Dream™ has garnered multiple awards for their effective sleep solutions. The 'Arms Up' movement is set to raise awareness about the importance of quality sleep.

news.headline: US to engage allies to impose similar measures or risk US retaliation - Draft US Executive Order.

Jim Cramer says market not 'oversold enough' for major bounce back with Broadcom's 12.82% surge. Broadcom slipped 6.33% before recovering in after-hours, but Cramer doubts it can pull Nasdaq out of slump. AVGO's AI spending at $14.9 billion could boost AI stocks. Nasdaq correction not 'oversold' enough for 'powerful' recovery despite AVGO earnings.
news.summary: The Nasdaq 100 index saw a decline, entering correction territory, with a nearly 10% drop from its previous high. Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO) experienced a 6.33% slip during this time. However, after-hours trading saw AVGO surge by 12.82% following the company’s impressive earnings report and outlook. Despite optimism from Gary Black about Broadcom's high first-quarter AI spending of $14.9 billion compared to the estimated $14.6 billion, CNBC’s Jim Cramer expressed doubts. Cramer mentioned that he did not believe the Nasdaq correction had dipped low enough to anticipate a significant rebound based on Broadcom's strong performance. This update can be found in detail on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Update: Ascot gives more info on financing announcement, details undisclosed.
news.summary: Last month, a study revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to its lowest level in five years. The latest data shows that the rate now stands at 4.2%, down from 5.6% in the previous year. This decrease represents a significant improvement in the labor market, with over 500,000 new jobs created in the last quarter alone. Analysts attribute this positive trend to various government initiatives aimed at boosting economic growth and employment opportunities. Furthermore, the report highlighted a notable increase in wages, with average hourly earnings rising by 3.8% compared to the same period last year. This surge in employment and income levels suggests a healthier and more robust economy moving forward.

US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We are against currency manipulation.
Cloud GIS Patent Landscape Report analyzes 4,963 patents filed since 2010 across major jurisdictions, offering insights on market trends and growth projections.
news.summary: A comprehensive patent analysis report on Cloud GIS has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. Spanning 2010 to 2024, the report covers 4,963 patents across various major jurisdictions worldwide. It incorporates data from global patent filings, market sales trends, and growth forecasts to offer a detailed insight into the landscape. The report combines quantitative and qualitative information, providing a strong basis for assessing the technology sector.

news.headline: Trade policies under President Trump cause turmoil as corporate executives fear chaos and investors face losses due to uncertain tariffs.
news.summary: Chief executives are increasingly concerned about the "chaos" created by President Trump's fluctuating trade policies. As a result, investors are experiencing losses, with market fluctuations causing a negative impact on board rooms and trading rooms. This uncertainty is reflected in a notable decrease of X% in stock values across various industries. The sudden policy changes have led to a decrease in profits, causing significant stress and instability in the corporate sector.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent on whether tariffs will be long term: We'll see.
Appotronics chosen as exclusive supplier of automotive optical components by top automaker - Mar 7, 2025.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on March 7, 2025, Appotronics (688007.SH), a leading company on the STAR Market of the Shanghai Stock Exchange, disclosed that it has secured a significant deal with a well-known global automaker to be the sole provider of automotive optical components. This collaboration marks a major milestone for Appotronics and underscores its position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Guangdong Delegation meeting draws 267 journalists from 107 media orgs showcasing confidence as economic powerhouse.
news.summary: Yesterday, the Guangdong Delegation gathered in Guangzhou for a plenary meeting on March 6, 2025, during the third session of the 14th National People's Congress. The meeting attracted a total of 267 journalists representing 107 media organizations from both domestic and international outlets.

news.headline: Huawei and Turkcell signed a MoU at MWC 2025 to innovate in leading network technologies; key players in the industry.
news.summary: In Barcelona, Spain on March 7, 2025, Huawei and Turkcell (NYSE: TKC) (BIST: TCELL) announced a partnership at MWC2025. The agreement includes a Memorandum of Understanding aimed at advancing sustainable networks through cutting-edge products and solutions within the Turkcell Enhanced Network. This collaboration marks a significant step towards enhancing technological infrastructure in Türkiye.

news.headline: Liberty Defense engages ITG as market maker to boost stock liquidity. Stock traded on TSXV, aiming for better market.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia and Wilmington, Massachusetts on March 07, 2025, Liberty Defense Holdings Ltd. (referred to as "Liberty" or the "Company") disclosed a partnership with Independent Trading Group ("ITG"). Liberty, known for its AI-driven detection solutions for hidden threats and weapons, traded under the symbols TSXV: SCAN, OTCQB: LDDFF, FSE:E30. Pending regulatory approval, ITG will provide market-making services as per TSX Venture Exchange TSXV guidelines. The objective is to enhance liquidity and maintain a balanced market for the Company's common shares through trading on the TSXV and other platforms.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: We could see inherited economy starting to roll a bit.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: There's going to be a de-tox period for the economy.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent: If we have right policies, it can be s smooth transition.
Oklahoma experts recommend installing generators before storm season to ensure electric equipment runs smoothly.
news.summary: TULSA, Okla. - On March 7, 2025, Quality Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electric highlighted the benefits of whole-home generators in ensuring continuous power supply for essential electric equipment, particularly during storm seasons in Oklahoma. According to the company, April marks the beginning of increased storm activity in the region, making it crucial for homeowners to invest in reliable backup power solutions. By installing whole-home generators, property values can also see an increase while providing peace of mind to residents during power outages.

news.headline: Daylight Savings time increases risk of drowsy driving; 1/3 drivers admit to falling asleep at the wheel.
news.summary: The National Road Safety Foundation has issued guidance on staying attentive while driving, in light of a recent study revealing that 1 out of every 3 drivers acknowledge dozing off behind the wheel. With daylight savings time kicking in this Sunday, experts emphasize the heightened threats of drowsy driving on the roads.

news.headline: PostNet had $74 million in sales last year, awarded 36 franchise agreements in 2024.
news.summary: In 2024, a company specializing in printing and shipping solutions based in Denver granted 36 new franchise agreements. On March 7, 2025, PostNet, a renowned provider of top-notch printing and shipping services worldwide, revealed the acquisition of the aforementioned agreements. Additionally, the company reported a gross income of $74 million for the same period.
